steps.title: Royal Fork
steps.text: A fork attacks two pieces in one move. The knight is especially good at it — it jumps in a way no piece can block. Here, one knight move attacks both king AND queen.

steps.prompt: Play the knight to fork king and queen.
steps.hint: Nb4 attacks both c6 and d5.

steps.title: Queen Fork
steps.text: Queens can fork too — especially with check. When the opponent MUST respond to check, you get a free move to grab material elsewhere.

steps.hint: The queen zeros in on e5.
